skills.name: adr
skills.description: Manage Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) in Confluence — create new ADRs from template, update existing ones, generate status reports, sync status emojis, and review ADRs for quality. Use when ADR, architecture decision, or design record is mentioned.

skills.name: atlassian
skills.description: Interact with Jira and Confluence via REST API - search, create, update issues and pages

skills.name: d2-diagrams
skills.description: Generate diagrams from declarative text using D2 - modern text-to-diagram language with automatic layouts, themes, and advanced styling. Use when creating architecture diagrams, flowcharts, decision trees, workflow diagrams, sequence flows, or ERDs from text definitions.
